rule.description: sshd: attempt to login using a non-existent user

adaptation_note: We want to characterize this source IP's authentication FAILURES specifically (not successes) over the last 2 hours - we already know it triggered a failed-auth rule and we want to see all sibling failures from this source, not the noise of successful logins.
reference_query: python3 scripts/tools/wazuh_cli.py query --query 'rule.groups:sshd AND data.srcip:203.0.113.7 AND rule.id:(5710 OR 5712 OR 5716)' --window 2h
